overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving through a heavy snowstorm on a rural highway. The video shows game engine footage with snow-covered roads, forests, and occasional traffic. The truck navigates winding roads passing through varied roadside environments including noise barriers and wooden fences.

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a snow-covered highway through a dense winter forest. The road curves gently as the truck overtakes another large truck on the left. Snow-covered trees line both sides of the road with a wooden guardrail visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along the snowy highway where a blue metal noise barrier replaces the wooden fence and forest on the right side. The road remains winding through the winter landscape with heavy snowfall continuing.

segments.scene_description: After passing the blue noise barrier, the landscape opens up to snow-covered fields with the wooden fence returning on the right. The truck passes by small buildings on the left side of the road while following another vehicle in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain highway with mixed forest and fields

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding snowy highway, navigating through the winter landscape with reduced traffic

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving along the winding snowy highway, passing the buildings and returning to a more forested section. The wooden guardrail remains on the right as the road curves through the snow-covered landscape with the forest now closer on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a winding highway through a shifting winter landscape of dense forests and open fields. It begins by curving through a thick winter forest, where the truck overtakes another large vehicle beside a wooden guardrail. As the road winds further, the forest on the right gives way to a blue metal noise barrier that shields the highway amidst the heavy snowfall. The scene then opens up into wide, snow-covered fields with the wooden fence returning and small buildings appearing on the left as the truck follows a distant vehicle. Finally, the landscape closes back in as the road curves through another forested section, bringing the snow-covered trees closer to the left side of the highway.
